title: Nomads try out Kingswood golf course
description: GEORGE NEWS - SC Nomads played their first...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - SC Nomads played their first game of the year at Kingswood Golf Estate on 21 January.

The morning started off a little cloudy but that quickly disappeared, and they enjoyed a beautiful sunshine day.


> 73 players joined them for their monthly game.


Nomads thanks the sponsor for the day, Casper du Plessis of Wimpy York Street, as well as their national sponsors Motus, SAB, Taylormade and Stella Artois.

For more information regarding Southern Cape Nomads, visit their website: scnomads.org, or their Facebook page: Southern Cape Nomads.

Kingswood was looking as beautiful as ever.

Divisional winners:

A- 38 points Jaco Pick

B- 38 points Tjoepie Pretorius

C- 40 points Frederick de Swardt

Best-playing fourball:

Nols Viljoen, David Everleigh, Eugene Pretorius and Richard Norman

Worst-paying fourball:

Clinton Hall, Steve Twycross, Ant Smith and Chrisleo Botha

Matchbox (worst player):

Tim Leibrandt

The worst-playing fourball, from left: Chrisleo Botha, Steve Twycross, Clinton Hall and Ant Smit. In the middle is Tjoepie Pretorius.

Casper du Plessis (left) of Wimpy York Street, the sponsor for the day, with Tjoepie Pretorius.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
